title: x-sovereignty Extension
description: Sovereignty AI governance extension namespace for FedRAMP-compatible evidence metadata. Carries versioned authority identifiers, Merkle-ledger references, SCAR audit chain linkage, ML-DSA (FIPS 204) attestation metadata, and evidence digests. This project-specific vendor extension does not alter or replace official FedRAMP requirements. Schema fields capture attestation references and metadata; the schema itself does not perform cryptographic operations.

mlDsaParameterSet.title: ML-DSA Parameter Set
mlDsaParameterSet.description: FIPS 204 (ML-DSA) parameter set identifier. ML-DSA-44 targets NIST security level 2; ML-DSA-65 targets security level 3; ML-DSA-87 targets security level 5.

mlDsaSignatureMaterial.title: ML-DSA Inline Signature Material
mlDsaSignatureMaterial.description: Carries an ML-DSA signature value (FIPS 204) produced by sovereign-mldsa-native or a compatible implementation. Use this definition when the signature bytes are embedded directly in the document rather than referenced externally.

kind.description: Discriminator: this object contains inline signature bytes.

signerPublicKeyId.description: Identifier of the signer's public key (e.g. a key fingerprint or authority-assigned key ID).

signatureEncoding.description: Encoding used for the signatureValue field.

signatureValue.description: Encoded ML-DSA signature bytes. Encoding is specified by signatureEncoding.

signedPayloadDigestAlgorithm.description: Hash algorithm applied to the payload before signing.

signedPayloadDigest.description: Hex-encoded digest of the exact bytes that were signed.

signedAt.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the signature was produced.

mlDsaAttestationReference.title: ML-DSA External Attestation Reference
mlDsaAttestationReference.description: References an ML-DSA attestation artifact stored externally (e.g. in a SCAR ledger entry or attestation bundle). The signature bytes are NOT embedded here; this object records where to locate the signed attestation and how to verify it.

kind.description: Discriminator: this object is an external attestation reference, not inline signature bytes.

attestationBundleId.description: Stable identifier for the attestation bundle or artifact (e.g. a SCAR ledger entry ID or archive filename).

attestationBundleUri.description: Optional URI locating the attestation bundle (e.g. within an authenticated package repository).

bundleDigestAlgorithm.description: Hash algorithm used to compute the digest of the referenced attestation bundle.

bundleDigest.description: Hex-encoded digest of the referenced attestation bundle for integrity verification.

signerPublicKeyId.description: Identifier of the signer's public key used to produce the attestation.

issuedAt.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the attestation was issued.

mlDsaAttestation.title: ML-DSA Attestation
mlDsaAttestation.description: Either inline signature material or a reference to an external attestation artifact. Use 'inline-signature' when embedding signature bytes directly; use 'attestation-reference' when pointing to an external bundle produced by sovereign-mldsa-native or equivalent.

scarLedgerReference.title: SCAR Audit Ledger Reference
scarLedgerReference.description: Identifies a specific entry in the Sovereign Compliance Audit Record (SCAR) ledger, anchoring this package overview to an immutable, Merkle-chained audit trail.

ledgerId.description: Identifier of the SCAR ledger instance (e.g. a device-bound ledger ID).

entryId.description: Unique identifier of the specific ledger entry.

entryDigest.description: Hex-encoded digest of the ledger entry payload for cross-reference integrity.

sequenceNumber.description: Monotonic sequence number of the entry within the ledger.

mlDsaImplementation.title: ML-DSA Implementation Metadata
mlDsaImplementation.description: Identifies the ML-DSA algorithm and implementation used for attestation without pinning the protocol to a particular repository.

sovereigntyProtocol.title: Sovereignty Protocol Capability Declaration
sovereigntyProtocol.description: Declares the SBP protocol version and capabilities supported by the producer, allowing independent implementations to negotiate interoperability.

authorityId.description: Stable identifier for the root-of-trust authority that governs this package.

authorityVersion.description: Version of the authority identity and governance document used for this package.

authorityFingerprint.description: Fingerprint of the authority key or root document, used to distinguish rotated authority material.

merkleRoot.description: Hex-encoded Merkle root committing to the set of evidence artifacts included in this package. Computed by the SCAR audit chain or an equivalent Merkle accumulator.

merkleRootAlgorithm.description: Hash algorithm used to compute leaf hashes and internal nodes of the Merkle tree.

merkleTreeFormat.description: Versioned format defining node ordering, domain separation, and parent-node construction.

canonicalizationVersion.description: Version of the canonical serialization used for Merkle leaves.

leafHashAlgorithm.description: Hash algorithm used specifically for Merkle leaf values.

auditChainId.description: Identifier of the sovereign audit chain (SCAR ledger) instance to which this package is anchored.

auditLedgerVersion.description: Version of the audit ledger protocol used by auditChainId.

auditLedgerType.description: Type of ledger identified by auditChainId.

anchorFrequency.description: Declared frequency at which audit entries are anchored or checkpointed.

checkpointId.description: Identifier of the ledger checkpoint containing this package anchor.

mlDsaAttestation.description: ML-DSA (FIPS 204) attestation for this package overview, produced using sovereign-mldsa-native or a compatible FIPS 204 implementation. May be inline signature bytes or a reference to an external attestation bundle.

authorityPolicyVersion.description: Version identifier of the sovereign authority policy under which this package was evaluated (e.g. 'policy-v1.2.0').

evidenceDigest.description: Prefixed hex-encoded digest over the canonical serialization of all evidence records (e.g. 'sha3-512:<hex>'). Provides a single integrity anchor for the full evidence set.

mlDsaImplementation.description: Algorithm, implementation, and version metadata for the ML-DSA attestation producer.

sovereigntyProtocol.description: SBP protocol version and capabilities supported by the package producer.
